summary: A town website for Jackman, Maine (ZIP: 04945). The site will serve as an informational hub for the town.

existing_features.title: Create a homepage for the Town of Jackman, Maine (ZIP 04945) that prominently displays the town name, a welcome message, and key navigation to all sections of the site.

Create an 'About Jackman' section that includes a brief description of the town, its location in Somerset County, Maine, and highlights such as its proximity to the Canadian border and outdoor recreation.
Create a 'Town Services' section listing common municipal services such as Town Office contact information, public works, and emergency services.

Create a 'Local Events & News' section that allows town administrators to post announcements and upcoming events. Store events and announcements in the backend with title, date, and description fields.
Create a 'Recreation & Outdoors' section highlighting Jackman's outdoor activities such as snowmobiling, fishing, hiking, and the Moose River, with descriptive text and relevant imagery.

Create a 'Contact Us' section displaying the Town of Jackman's address (ZIP 04945), a placeholder phone number, and a simple contact form with name, email, and message fields. Store submitted messages in the backend.

Apply a cohesive visual theme inspired by the rugged, forested wilderness of northern Maine — using deep forest greens, warm slate grays, and natural wood-toned accents. Typography should feel sturdy and welcoming. Layout should be clean and easy to navigate for all ages.
Render the generated images (hero landscape, outdoor recreation scene) as static assets served from frontend/public/assets/generated and display them in the appropriate site sections.

Update the Town Services page (frontend/src/pages/ServicesPage.tsx) to display dedicated emergency services listings for the Sheriff, Fire Department, and Ambulance, each showing their service name and a phone number that links to 'tel:911'. Ensure the 911 emergency banner and these individual service entries are visually prominent and consistent with the existing Northern Maine theme.

new_feature_requests.summary: Add emergency services contact info (Sheriff, Fire Department, Ambulance) with phone numbers linking to 911 in the Town Services section
